HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering
 
Loading...
Searching...
No Matches
include Directory Reference

Files

 Bsp3D.h
 3D Binary Space Partitioning (BSP) utilities for triangle meshes.
 
 CLParser.h
 Minimal command-line argument parsing utilities.
 
 Dipole.h
 Incident field generator for electric dipole illumination in homogeneous or layered media.
 
 Domain.h
 Abstract simulation domain class for SIE scattering.
 
 DomainHom3D.h
 Homogeneous 3D simulation domain (derived from Domain).
 
 DomainHom3DPer.h
 Homogeneous 3D domain with in‑plane periodicity (derived from DomainHom3D).
 
 DomainLayered3D.h
 Layered 3D simulation domain (derived from Domain).
 
 Gaussian.h
 Incident field: paraxial Gaussian beam in a homogeneous medium.
 
 GaussQuad.h
 Gaussian quadrature helpers for Green's functions and incident fields.
 
 globals.h
 Global numerical constants, fundamental types, and simple macros.
 
 GreenF.h
 Abstract base class for electromagnetic Green's functions.
 
 GreenFHom3D.h
 3D scalar/dyadic Green's function in a homogeneous background.
 
 GreenFHom3DPer.h
 Periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function (abstract base).
 
 GreenFHom3DPer2D.h
 Periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function with 2D in‑plane periodicity.
 
 GreenFLayered3D.h
 Layered‑medium 3D Green's function (scalar/gradient/dyadic) + RWG integrals.
 
 IncidentField.h
 Abstract interface for incident electromagnetic excitations.
 
 iofunctions.h
 Small helper templates for reading whitespace-separated values from text files while skipping line comments.
 
 JobParser.h
 Lightweight XML-like tag parser for the solver job file.
 
 LayeredMediaUtils.h
 This header declares utility structures and algorithms used throughout the layered-media scattering solver.
 
 mathFunctions.h
 Header file of the class that provides auxiliary mathematical functionalities for the SIE solver.
 
 PlaneWave.h
 Defines the PlaneWave class: representation of a plane‐wave incident field.
 
 quadrature.h
 Declarations of Dunavant (triangle) and Gauss–Legendre (1D) quadrature rules.
 
 RWGFun.h
 Header for the RWGFun class.
 
 SIEForm.h
 Header for the SIEForm class.
 
 SIEFormPMCHW.h
 Header file for the SIEFormPMCHW class.
 
 SimJob.h
 Orchestrates a full simulation run: parse job/subjobs, build the linear system, solve it, and optionally post-process fields.
 
 SingCancellation.h
 Quadrature point/weight builders for singularity-cancellation on triangles.
 
 SingSub.h
 Exact subtractions for singular/near-singular triangle integrals.
 
 SommerfeldIntegrator.h
 Declaration of the SommerfeldIntegrator class, which evaluates Sommerfeld-type integrals for layered media Green's functions.
 
 SurfaceMesh.h
 Declaration of the SurfaceMesh class and mesh edge struct.
 
 Triangle.h
 Declaration of the Triangle class (surface element with cached geometry).
 
 TriQuadPol.h
 Polar quadrature on a single triangle around an observation point.
